A patient with cancerous growths in their salivary glands undergoes surgery to have them removed. How might this affect the digestive processes? (0.5 points) 128 MALGOSIA WILK-BLASZCZAK

LAB 9: URINARY AND REPRODUCTIVE SYSTEMS HUMAN ANATOMY LAB MANUAL 129

130 MALGOSIA WILK-BLASZCZAK

LAB 9: URINARY AND REPRODUCTIVE SYSTEMS MEASURABLE OUTCOMES • Analyze reproductive and urinary organ tissues under the microscope. • Complete the dissection of the kidney and accurately identify (with a pin) all structures of the kidney using the corresponding vocabulary list. • Learn about the organs of the urinary system: kidney, ureter, urinary
